sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86899" key="progh/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προγήρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γῆρας</etym>) <sense id="n86899.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prematurely old,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
